items.summary: arXiv:2607.19837v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Traditional pentesting uses reconnaissance at each step to uncover unseen weaknesses, build stronger attacks, and advance the objective; we argue that AI agents require the same treatment. We formalize agent reconnaissance by mod…

items.summary: arXiv:2607.20058v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models can answer scientific questions, yet a correct output does not reveal whether the model represents or uses the governing physics. Here we show that materials science mechanism information in the open-weight …

items.summary: Atoms, Travis Kalanick's robotics firm, has secured $1.7 billion in funding. This investment, led by Andreessen Horowitz, will fuel industrial AI development. The company focuses on automation for mining, transport, and food production sectors. Atoms also acquired self-driving…

items.summary: ServiceNow's investment gives BusinessNext a strategic partner to expand its AI-powered banking software globally.

items.title: Intel, AMD sign long-term server CPU deals with Chinese clients as prices surge
items.summary: The move highlights a broader consequence of the AI boom: demand has spread beyond AI accelerators to memory, networking gear and server processors, giving suppliers greater leverage to seek long-term purchase deals.

items.title: AI catches up with humans to score 100% at top maths contest
items.summary: Artificial intelligence has reached a new milestone, unveiling the capability to score a perfect 100 at the International Mathematical Olympiad. Huawei and Xiaohongshu have declared that their AI systems excelled on this rigorous exam, marking a historic moment in AI developme…

items.title: China has cracked down on AI companions. What can we learn from this?
items.summary: Generative AI companions offer constant availability and support for lonely individuals. However, these virtual relationships risk dependency and displacing genuine human connections. China has implemented strict rules for AI companions, restricting emotional dependence and un…

items.title: AI will not trigger employment collapse, staffing company Adecco Group says
items.summary: AI will transform work by changing roles and tasks, not eliminating jobs. Employment rates remain high and unemployment is near historic lows globally. Companies must redesign junior roles to integrate AI and protect talent. Upskilling and reskilling are essential for this evo…

careers.note: Demand snapshot for 2026. ML Engineer is the most in-demand AI title; agentic-AI and deep-learning skills carry the highest pay premiums; Python + one cloud is the baseline. Specialisation beats generalisation for freshers.

paths.note: #1 AI title — build, deploy & maintain models in production. Best all-round entry into AI.
RAG, tool-use & multi-agent systems. ~40% of enterprise apps will embed AI agents by year-end.
Neural nets for vision & speech. Highest premiums; usually needs strong maths / grad study.
Ship & scale models on the cloud. Cloud AI certs add 20–25% to salary.
Foundational, widest entry door; a reliable first step into AI.
Imaging, robotics, autonomous systems, medical AI.
Powers chatbots, search & agents — the hottest application area.
5–8 yrs experience; $140k–$332k bands. Translates AI into business value.
Alignment, evals, red-teaming & policy — newer but expanding fast.

fresher.why: The lingua franca of ML — non-negotiable.
Linear algebra, probability & calculus — enough to reason about models.
Regression, classification, evaluation, the ML workflow.
Build & train neural nets; PyTorch dominates research & jobs.
Ship a small LLM app — the most visible skill to recruiters now.
Real AI work is mostly data; SQL is everywhere.
AWS leads (~40% of postings), then Azure & GCP. Version everything.
A deployed project that solves a real problem is the #1 differentiator.

experienced.why: Docker, CI/CD, monitoring, model/versioning — production is where value lives.
Multi-agent orchestration, tool-use, evals — the surging frontier.
AWS/Azure/GCP architecture; certs add a 20–25% salary premium.
Adapt, measure and harden models for a domain.
Cost & latency engineering for large models.
Trade-offs across data, latency, cost & reliability at scale.
CV, NLP, recsys, healthcare — depth beats breadth at senior levels.
Leading teams and tying models to measurable outcomes.

profile.name: Harman Singh Sandhu
profile.blurb: I build AI/ML projects and write about them. This site is one of them — an automated daily AI digest.

repos.name: Ace-rentals
repos.desc: Ace Rentals: A full-stack property rental platform built with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Features user authentication, image uploads, geocoding, reviews, and secure account management. Inspired by Airbnb.
